messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a python-pptx script that builds an 18-slide creative presentation for High-Net-Worth Individuals about our Sustainable Investment Portfolio. Incorporate green earth tones and nature imagery placeholders. Output the file as "Sustainable_Invest.pptx". All content must be written in English using a 16:9 Widescreen layout. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os

# ── Deck Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Sustainable_Invest.pptx"
TOTAL_PAGES = 18

PALETTE = {
    "forest_green": "#1B4332",
    "sage":       "#95D5B2",
    "cream":      "#FEFAE0",
    "olive":      "#A3B18A",
    "charcoal":   "#2C3E50",
    "gold":       "#D4AF37",
    "white":      "#FFFFFF",
    "light_green":"#D8F3DC",
}

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SIZE_TITLE = 36
FONT_SIZE_SUBTITLE = 18
FONT_SIZE_BODY = 14
FONT_SIZE_SMALL = 12
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.25)

# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color="#2C3E50", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color="#FFFFFF", border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.5), text, 28, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(prs, slide, page_num):
    footer_shape = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(7.1), Inches(4), Inches(0.3))
    tf = footer_shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"Sustainable Investment Portfolio  |  {page_num} / {TOTAL_PAGES}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["olive"])
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    right_footer = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(9.5), Inches(7.1), Inches(3.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf2 = right_footer.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "CONFIDENTIAL"
    run2.font.size = Pt(10)
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["olive"])
    run2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height, label="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["light_green"])
        ph.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["sage"])
        ph.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.3),
                     width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.6), label, 14, False, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["forest_green"])
    add_text_box(s, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(8.3), Inches(1.2),
                 "Sustainable Investment Portfolio", 44, True, PALETTE["cream"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(s, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.6),
                 "A Curated Approach for High-Net-Worth Individuals", 22, False, PALETTE["sage"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_section_label(s, "", Inches(4.5), Inches(3.7))
    line = s.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.5), Inches(3.85), Inches(4.3), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
    line.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(s, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.6),
                 "ESG-Aligned Strategies  •  Long-Term Value Creation  •  Measurable Impact", 16, False, PALETTE["olive"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_image_or_placeholder(s, "assets/earth.jpg", Inches(5.5), Inches(5.2), Inches(2.3), Inches(1.4), "Earth Image")
    add_footer(prs, s, 1)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Executive Summary", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])
    add_section_label(s, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1))

    stats = [
        ("$4.2T", "Global ESG AUM"),
        ("12.5%", "Avg. Annual Return"),
        ("3.8x", "Impact Multiplier"),
    ]
    for i, (val, label) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 4.1)
        card = add_card(s, x, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.2), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(2.3), Inches(2.9), Inches(1.0), val, 40, True, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(0.6), label, 14, False, PALETTE["charcoal"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(11.7), Inches(2.0),
                 "Our Sustainable Investment Portfolio is designed for discerning investors who seek to align their capital with environmental and social responsibility while delivering competitive financial returns. Through rigorous ESG integration, active stewardship, and impact measurement, we deliver portfolios that generate both alpha and positive change.", 14, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])
    add_footer(prs, s, 2)


def slide_03_market_overview(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Market Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Market Overview", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    add_image_or_placeholder(s, "assets/esg_chart.jpg", Inches(7.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.0), Inches(3.5), "ESG Market Chart")
    add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.5), "Key Trends", 24, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    trends = [
        ("Regulatory Tailwinds", "SEC and EU regulations driving mandatory ESG disclosures"),
        ("Capital Reallocation", "$1T+ flowing into sustainable funds annually"),
        ("Performance Parity", "ESG portfolios matching or beating traditional benchmarks"),
        ("Stakeholder Demand", "HNWI clients increasingly requesting impact reporting"),
    ]
    for i, (title_t, desc) in enumerate(trends):
        y = Inches(2.1 + i * 1.35)
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(6.0), Inches(0.4), title_t, 16, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])
        add_text_box(s, Inches(1.2), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.5), desc, 13, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

    add_footer(prs, s, 3)


def slide_04_philosophy(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["forest_green"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Our Philosophy"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Our Philosophy", 32, True, PALETTE["cream"])

    card = add_card(s, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5), Inches(10.3), Inches(4.5), "#2D6A4F")
    add_text_box(s, Inches(2.0), Inches(1.8), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.7), "Investing with Purpose", 30, True, PALETTE["gold"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(s, Inches(2.0), Inches(2.6), Inches(9.3), Inches(3.0),
                 '"We believe that the most compelling investment opportunities lie at the intersection of financial excellence and positive impact. Our approach integrates rigorous fundamental analysis with deep ESG expertise to identify companies leading the transition to a sustainable economy."', 15, False, PALETTE["cream"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(s, Inches(2.0), Inches(6.3), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.5),
                 "Three Pillars: Financial Rigor • Environmental Stewardship • Social Responsibility", 14, True, PALETTE["sage"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(prs, s, 4)


def slide_05_portfolio_strategy(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Portfolio Strategy"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Portfolio Strategy", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    pillars = [
        ("Active ESG Integration", "Proprietary scoring model applied to every holding"),
        ("Thematic Investing", "Clean energy, water security, circular economy themes"),
        ("Engagement & Stewardship", "Direct dialogue with portfolio company leadership"),
        ("Impact Measurement", "Quarterly reporting on KPI-aligned outcomes"),
    ]
    for i, (title_p, desc) in enumerate(pillars):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.8 + col * 6.1)
        y = Inches(1.3 + row * 2.9)
        card = add_card(s, x, y, Inches(5.7), Inches(2.4), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.2), Inches(5.1), Inches(0.6), title_p, 18, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.9), Inches(5.1), Inches(1.3), desc, 13, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

    add_footer(prs, s, 5)


def slide_06_asset_allocation(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Asset Allocation"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Asset Allocation", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Equities", "Fixed Income", "Real Assets", "Private Equity", "Cash"]
    chart_data.add_series("Allocation %", (45, 20, 18, 12, 5))

    chart_frame = s.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False

    add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(5.2), Inches(3.5),
                 "Our portfolio is strategically diversified across asset classes with a significant overweight to sustainable equities and real assets aligned with the global energy transition.", 14, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

    add_footer(prs, s, 6)


def slide_07_performance_metrics(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Performance Metrics"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Performance Metrics", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data_perf = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data_perf.categories = ["2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024"]
    chart_data_perf.add_series("Portfolio Return %", (8.5, 14.2, 18.7, -2.1, 16.3, 19.8))
    chart_data_perf.add_series("MSCI World Index", (10.2, 18.4, 26.3, -18.1, 15.5, 22.1))

    chart_frame = s.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(7.5), Inches(4.0), chart_data_perf
    )
    chart_p = chart_frame.chart
    chart_p.has_legend = True

    kpis = [("YTD Return", "19.8%"), ("3-Year CAGR", "12.5%"), ("Sharpe Ratio", "1.42"), ("Max Drawdown", "-8.3%")]
    for i, (kpi_label, kpi_val) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.2)
        card = add_card(s, x, Inches(5.6), Inches(2.9), Inches(1.2), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(5.7), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4), kpi_label, 12, False, PALETTE["charcoal"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(6.1), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.5), kpi_val, 22, True, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, s, 7)


def slide_08_sector_distribution(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Sector Distribution"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Sector Distribution", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data_sec = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data_sec.categories = ["Technology", "Healthcare", "Clean Energy", "Financials", "Consumer Staples", "Industrials"]
    chart_data_sec.add_series("Weight %", (28, 18, 15, 14, 13, 12))

    chart_frame = s.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_STACKED, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(7.5), Inches(4.5), chart_data_sec
    )
    chart_s = chart_frame.chart
    chart_s.has_legend = True

    add_text_box(s, Inches(8.6), Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(5.0),
                 "Our sector allocation reflects a deliberate tilt toward companies positioned to benefit from the global transition to sustainable energy and circular economy models.", 13, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

    add_footer(prs, s, 8)


def slide_09_geographic_exposure(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Geographic Exposure"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Geographic Exposure", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    add_image_or_placeholder(s, "assets/world_map.jpg", Inches(5.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(7.0), Inches(3.8), "World Map")

    regions = [
        ("North America", "42%", "Mature markets with strong ESG frameworks"),
        ("Europe", "31%", "Leading regulatory environment for sustainability"),
        ("Asia-Pacific", "27%", "High-growth sustainable investment opportunities"),
    ]
    for i, (region, pct, desc) in enumerate(regions):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 4.1)
        card = add_card(s, x, Inches(5.3), Inches(3.7), Inches(1.6), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(5.4), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.4), region, 16, True, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(5.8), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.4), pct, 24, True, PALETTE["gold"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(6.3), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.5), desc, 11, False, PALETTE["charcoal"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, s, 9)


def slide_10_risk_management(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Management Framework"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Risk Management Framework", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    risks = [
        ("Market Risk", "Dynamic hedging strategies and volatility targeting"),
        ("ESG Controversy", "Real-time screening with rapid response protocols"),
        ("Liquidity Risk", "Staggered maturity profiles across holdings"),
        ("Climate Risk", "Scenario analysis aligned with TCFD recommendations"),
    ]
    for i, (title_r, desc) in enumerate(risks):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.8 + col * 6.1)
        y = Inches(1.3 + row * 2.9)
        card = add_card(s, x, y, Inches(5.7), Inches(2.4), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        shape_icon = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6)) if False else None
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(1.1), y + Inches(0.2), Inches(4.3), Inches(0.5), title_r, 17, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.9), Inches(5.1), Inches(1.3), desc, 13, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

    add_footer(prs, s, 10)


def slide_11_impact_measurement(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Impact Measurement"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Impact Measurement", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    impacts = [
        ("CO₂ Avoided", "1.2M tons/year"),
        ("Clean Energy Generated", "850 GWh annually"),
        ("Jobs Created", "4,200+ direct positions"),
        ("Water Saved", "3.5 billion liters"),
    ]
    for i, (metric, value) in enumerate(impacts):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.2)
        card = add_card(s, x, Inches(1.4), Inches(2.9), Inches(2.5), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        shape_icon = s.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CLOUD, x + Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.7))
        shape_icon.fill.solid()
        shape_icon.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["sage"])
        shape_icon.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(2.4), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.6), value, 22, True, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(3.1), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.7), metric, 14, False, PALETTE["charcoal"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(2.5),
                 "Our proprietary impact measurement framework tracks environmental and social outcomes across every portfolio holding. We report quarterly using SASB standards and align with UN Sustainable Development Goals to provide transparent, auditable impact data.", 14, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

    add_footer(prs, s, 11)


def slide_12_esg_integration(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "ESG Integration Process"
    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "ESG Integration Process", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    steps = [
        ("Screening", "Negative & positive ESG filters"),
        ("Scoring", "Proprietary 1-100 rating system"),
        ("Due Diligence", "Deep-dive analysis by sector experts"),
        ("Engagement", "Active ownership and proxy voting"),
        ("Monitoring", "Continuous tracking and rebalancing"),
    ]
    for i, (step_name, step_desc) in enumerate(steps):
        x = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.6)
        card = add_card(s, x, Inches(1.4), Inches(2.3), Inches(2.8), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        num_shape = s.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.75), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["forest_green"])
        num_shape.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.75), Inches(1.65), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.7), str(i+1), 24, True, PALETTE["cream"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(2.6), Inches(2.1), Inches(0.5), step_name, 15, True, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(3.1), Inches(2.1), Inches(0.9), step_desc, 12, False, PALETTE["charcoal"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for i in range(len(steps) - 1):
        arrow_x = Inches(0.5 + (i+1) * 2.6 - 0.3)
        arrow = s.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, arrow_x, Inches(2.7), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4))
        arrow.fill.solid()
        arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
        arrow.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(prs, s, 12)

The fund's diversified portfolio spans utility-scale installations across Germany, Spain, and Italy.", 13, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

def slide_14_investment_opportunities(prs):

        ("Water Infrastructure", "Desalination and wastewater treatment assets"),

        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.9), Inches(5.1), Inches(1.3), opp_desc, 13, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

def slide_16_fee_structure(prs):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(s, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = s.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:

    else:
        add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.7), "Fee Structure", 32, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])

    tiers = [
        ("Core Portfolio", "1.00% / year", "Minimum $5M AUM"),
        ("Premium Strategy", "1.25% / year", "Minimum $10M AUM"),
        ("Impact Alpha Fund", "1.50% + 10% carry", "Minimum $25M AUM"),
    ]
    for i, (tier_name, fee, min_aum) in enumerate(tiers):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 4.1)
        card = add_card(s, x, Inches(1.3), Inches(3.7), Inches(3.5), PALETTE["white"], PALETTE["sage"])
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(1.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.6), tier_name, 20, True, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        line = s.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x + Inches(0.8), Inches(2.2), Inches(2.1), Pt(2))
        line.fill.solid()
        line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
        line.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(2.4), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.8), fee, 26, True, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(s, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(3.3), Inches(3.3), Inches(1.2), min_aum, 14, False, PALETTE["charcoal"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(s, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.2), Inches(11.7), Inches(1.5),
                 "All fees are transparent and disclosed upfront. Performance fees are calculated on a high-water mark basis with no hurdle rate. We believe in aligning our interests with yours — we only succeed when you do.", 14, False, PALETTE["charcoal"])

    add_footer(prs, s, 16)

# ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_market_overview(prs)
    slide_04_philosophy(prs)
    slide_05_portfolio_strategy(prs)
    slide_06_asset_allocation(prs)
    slide_07_performance_metrics(prs)
    slide_08_sector_distribution(prs)
    slide_09_geographic_exposure(prs)
    slide_10_risk_management(prs)
    slide_11_impact_measurement(prs)
    slide_12_esg_integration(prs)
    slide_13_case_study(prs)
    slide_14_investment_opportunities(prs)
    slide_15_portfolio_construction(prs)
    slide_16_fee_structure(prs)
    slide_17_competitive_advantages(prs)
    slide_18_contact(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
